summary: Completed testing of new admin features for Arena Booking System - Profile editing, Site settings, and Sport image upload functionality. All new features working correctly with proper integration between admin panel and public website.
passed_tests: Admin dashboard shows Beállítások and Profilom menu items
/admin/settings page loads with site settings form
/admin/profile page loads with profile edit form
Settings page has all required fields: site_name, hero_title, hero_subtitle, footer_text
Settings page has 3 file upload fields: site_logo, hero_image, footer_logo
Profile page has all required fields: name, email, phone, current_password, new_password
/admin/sports page shows file upload instead of URL input for sport image
Profile update functionality works with success message 'Profil frissítve'
Settings update functionality works with success message 'Beállítások mentve'
Settings changes immediately reflected on public homepage
Site name, hero title, hero subtitle, and footer text updates working
Password change functionality verified with login test
All 24 backend API endpoints working (100% success rate)
Sport creation with file upload (not URL) working correctly
Hungarian language interface properly implemented for new features
